name: ui-regression-pinner does not fire when the commit diff touches only non-UI paths
command: mkdir -p repo/src/lib && (cd repo && git init -q) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner-trigger.sh" --root repo --diff-stub touched=src/lib/util.ts --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pinner_fires=false' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=no_ui_path_touched' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
